corrections.location: Esth III 13, line with πάντας σὺν γυναιξὶ
corrections.note: Printed acute on final syllable, not grave.
Transcript badly misread the verb; image clearly has ἐκπηδήσας.

notes: Running head and apparatus match the scan. Left-margin line/verse indicators (e.g. 6, 7, III 14, 15, IV 1–4) are correctly represented as layout markers, not body text.
